name: let-dev-runner
description: Run the LET backend and frontend together

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.start:frontend: VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:4000/api VITE_SOCKET_URL=http://localhost:4000 npm --prefix User-Frontend run preview -- --port 3000
